title: FS First Steps Baby Blanket 70X70CM (Pink)
description: This Baby Blanket is a must have in Pink Colour. Its an ideal size of 75cm x 75cm - meaning this blanket is the perfect size for covering you baby whether they are at home, in a cot, crib, pram or even great for swaddling. The blanket could also be used to comfort your baby during breastfeeding.
